deviations.what: The picked time is transported to the backend via a two-way value binding on TimePickerSliders (an extra attribute; the original reads it imperatively with oTP.getValue()). OK composes the result text from the current time_value, Cancel restores the pre-open value captured on OPEN_DIALOG (the attachAfterOpen equivalent).

The result text uses the static control id 'TPS2' because the original's runtime-generated oTP.getId() cannot be reproduced. The cosmetic collapseAll() on the sliders as the dialog closes is dropped (no visible effect on a closing dialog).
